title: 3 of 5 buyers never see your listing.
description: Etsy search returns different results depending on which size a buyer searches for. A seller with only 2:3 sizes is invisible to 8×10 buyers, A4 buyers, 11×14 buyers, and square buyers. SnapToSize generates all 5 ratio packs from one upload — 2:3, 3:4, 4:5, ISO, Extras. One upload. Every search. Every buyer. snaptosize.com
